PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

our services

  • Full locker room solutions
  • Quick ship lockers
  • View our gallery

latest blog posts

  • College Locker Room Design Guide November 20, 2024
  • Wood vs Metal Sports Lockers October 15, 2024
  • Locker Rooms That Win Recruits September 10, 2024

Follow us on Instagram

@playerstall

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

b Monday-Friday: 9am to 5pm;
Saturday: 10am to 2pm

z 2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

m 1 888 584 1444

d sales@playerstall.com
